title: More Tools
description: Port the higher version tool (copper tool) to version 1.21.1
body:
## **Why make this mod**

Are you frustrated that the 1.21.9- version of Minecraft doesn't have copper armor and tools?In this mod, I have backported the copper armor and tools from the 1.21.9 update to versions higher than 1.21.1 but lower than 1.21.9.Adding this mod while playing will definitely bring you more fun, so you won't end up mining a lot of copper for nothing.More tools will be added in the future
